title: SpecOps Configuration
description: Configuration schema for SpecOps spec-driven development workflow

specsDir.description: Directory where specification files are stored. Must be a relative path within the project.

vertical.description: Project vertical that influences spec template adaptation. Auto-detected when not set.

templates.description: Template configuration for different spec types

bugfix.description: Template name for bug fix specifications

tasks.description: Template name for task breakdown specifications

conventions.description: List of team-specific development conventions to follow

reviewRequired.description: Whether spec review is required before implementation

specReview.description: Collaborative spec review workflow configuration. When enabled, specs go through a review cycle (draft → in-review → approved) before implementation.

enabled.description: Enable collaborative spec review workflow. Falls back to reviewRequired if not set.

minApprovals.description: Number of approvals required before a spec can proceed to implementation

allowSelfApproval.description: Allow spec authors to self-review and self-approve. Enables solo developers to use the review workflow. Self-approvals produce a distinct 'self-approved' status.

autoCommit.description: Automatically commit changes after completing tasks

createPR.description: Automatically create pull request when implementation is complete

delegationThreshold.description: Complexity score threshold for auto task delegation. Score formula: sum(effort_weights) + floor(distinct_files / 5). Set to 1 to delegate on every spec (always-on equivalent). Max 20 -- see docs for disabling delegation.

validateReferences.description: Validate file paths and code references in spec against codebase before implementation. off: skip. warn: notify and continue. strict: block on unresolved references.

gitCheckpointing.description: Commit at phase boundaries (spec-created, implemented, completed). Three commits max per spec run. Complements autoCommit which commits per-task.

pipelineMaxCycles.description: Maximum Phase 3 to Phase 4 iteration cycles in pipeline mode. Pipeline stops after this many cycles even if criteria are unmet.

learnings.description: Production learnings configuration. Controls capture and surfacing of post-deployment discoveries.

maxSurfaced.description: Maximum number of learnings surfaced during Phase 1 loading

severityThreshold.description: Minimum severity level to surface learnings. Critical/high always surface regardless.

capturePrompt.description: When to prompt for learning capture. auto: Phase 4 + bugfix. manual: only /specops learn. off: disabled.

_installedVersion.description: SpecOps version that was installed. Written by installers, do not edit manually.

_installedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when SpecOps was installed. Written by installers, do not edit manually.

dependencySafety.description: Dependency safety verification. Controls CVE scanning, EOL detection, and best practices checks.

enabled.description: Enable the dependency safety gate in Phase 2. Set to false to disable.

severityThreshold.description: Severity level that blocks implementation. strict: block on any. medium: block on Critical/High. low: warn only.

autoFix.description: Attempt automatic remediation (e.g., npm audit fix) before re-evaluating findings.

allowedAdvisories.description: CVE IDs that are acknowledged and excluded from blocking. Maximum 50 entries.

scanScope.description: Scope of dependency scan. spec: only ecosystems relevant to current spec. project: all detected ecosystems.
